title: rosa clinophylla var. parvifolia
intro: Rosa clinophylla var. parvifolia, also known as Dwarf Korean Rose or Rosa 'Cinderella', is a type of hybrid tea rose cultivar that is known for its compact growth and delicate pink flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Rosa clinophylla var. parvifolia is believed to offer various health benefits, including reduced stress, improved skin health, and enhanced immune function, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Rosa clinophylla var. parvifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and skin conditions.
